- Why it belongs in this project:

## Type

- [ ] Template
- [ ] Shared MATLAB helper/API
- [ ] CLI or CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance only

## Review Evidence

- [ ] Uses clean-room code and deterministic synthetic data.
- [ ] Adds or updates an example, or explains why no example is needed.
- [ ] Updates documentation when behavior changes.
- [ ] Updates gallery outputs when a gallery-backed example changes.
- [ ] Keeps README, template reference, manifest, and gallery docs consistent.

## Local Checks

- [ ] `./scripts/check_static_quality.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/check_release_ready.sh`
- [ ] MATLAB-specific tests, or a note explaining why MATLAB was not available:

## Notes For Reviewers

- Closest existing template:
- Files that need the most careful review:
- Any known tradeoff or follow-up:

## Risk And Provenance

- [ ] No private data, credentials, local absolute paths, or identifying
      screenshots are included.
- [ ] No `.mat`, `.fig`, `.p`, Office, archive, or unclear third-party source
      files are included.
- [ ] Provenance warnings from local checks are either absent or explained for
      maintainer review.
- [ ] This PR does not claim adoption, endorsement, or benefit-program approval
      without public evidence.

- User-visible note, if this should appear in a release:
- Maintenance-only note, if this should stay out of a release:
